reason: The statement applies because the children of Israel were indeed forced to work for an evil king, Pharaoh, who oppressed them and made their lives bitter with hard bondage. The text describes how the king of Egypt set taskmasters over the Israelites to afflict them with burdens and made them serve with rigor. Additionally, the king ordered the Hebrew midwives to kill the male babies, showing his cruelty and oppression towards the Israelites.
